meta_description: A transformation journey for singers and artists who want to overcome blocks, fears and self-sabotage.
hero_sub: A transformative journey for singers and artists who want to overcome their limits and go beyond — to express their full potential with authenticity, presence, and a new harmony. On stage and in life.
problema_title_1: You have talent. And you know it.
problema_title_em: But you feel like you're not expressing your full potential.
problema_body_1: Sometimes it's an obvious block, other times it's something more subtle: habits, dynamics, thoughts, and mechanisms that hold you back — on stage and in life.
problema_body_2: It's not a technical problem. It's how you live, perceive yourself, and relate to others.
problema_pill: It's not others — it's you who still doesn't know yourself!
blocco_1_sub: When the stage becomes pressure instead of expression
blocco_2_sub: Even when you're good, something inside keeps questioning you
blocco_3_sub: You repeat patterns that hold you back, even without realizing it
blocco_4_sub: Everything seems perfect on the outside, but something feels off inside
cose_title_em: at the root of what limits you
cose_body:
VOICE is not a singing course. We don't work on technique. We work on YOU!

Whether you feel blocked or you're already in your career, the point is the same: — when you change, the way you live, express yourself, and create your art changes.
cose_quote: ''The statue is already inside the block of marble, you just need to remove the excess.''
pillar_1_body: Who you truly are as an artist — beyond the masks and the expectations of others.
pillar_2_body: The dynamics you've inherited that today influence your artistic expression.
pillar_3_body: Recognise, move through and dissolve the voice that tells you you're not enough.
pillar_4_body: Your value as an artist and your relationship with deserving success and abundance.
pillar_5_body: Clarify your direction and the message you want to bring into the world through your art.
perchi_1: You want to make a real leap in your career
perchi_2: You feel emotionally blocked, not just technically
perchi_3: You recognise that you self-sabotage at crucial moments
perchi_4: You want to express yourself with authenticity and full freedom
perchi_5: You're ready to do deep inner work
perchi_r1: A voice and presence free from emotional blocks
perchi_r2: Clarity on your identity and artistic mission
perchi_r3: Practical tools to use every day
perchi_r5: The ability to show up fully, every time
perchi_r6: A life aligned with your art
nonperchi_label: // This is not for you if...
nonperchi_items: [To configure] You're only looking for vocal technique or a traditional singing course.
[To configure] You're not willing to do deep inner work.
[To configure] You want immediate results without real commitment.
[To configure] You're going through an acute personal crisis that requires professional psychological support.
st1_body: An intensive and progressive journey for real, lasting transformation.
st2_body: Personalised coaching designed for your situation, your block, your voice.
st3_body: Exercises and practices to integrate into real life — not just during sessions.
perche_manifesto:
Not perfect. Free.

Every artist who unlocks themselves doesn't just change their career.
They change their life.

And when you change, your art changes. And your art changes the world.
coach_bio_1: [To configure] Describe your personal journey here: where you started, what you experienced as an artist, the turning point that led you to create VOICE.
coach_bio_2: [To configure] Add your credentials, training or the approach that sets your method apart.
coach_quote: [To configure] A phrase that represents you as a coach and as an artist.

testi.testo: Before VOICE I froze every time I stepped on stage. Now I perform with a presence I didn't know I had. Everything changed.
I thought it was a technical problem. It was actually a deep block I'd been carrying for years. In three months I made more progress than in five years of courses.
Elle V has a way of working that goes straight to the point. No theory, no empty exercises — real transformation. My career has restarted.

faq.q: Is this path only for those who have blocks on stage?
faq.a: No. It's for those who want to evolve as an artist and as a person, regardless of their starting point.

faq.q: How long does it take to see change?
faq.a: The first results already come in the early sessions. But real change takes time, because everything you work on needs to be experienced and integrated into your daily life. Each session is a step in your transformation journey.

faq.q: How can I follow the path if I have little time or a busy schedule?
faq.a: VOICE is an online and personalized program, designed to fit your schedule without disrupting your routine, giving you access to one-on-one work wherever you are.
It starts with a free call. We analyze your situation, understand where you are and where you want to go, and evaluate together whether VOICE is the right path for you.

cta_body:
Discover what is really holding you back and whether VOICE is the right path to help you level up.

Give yourself the opportunity to truly discover how far you can go!
